base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tile_graveyard_tombstone — a tile from 1986 legend of zelda. Tombstone — Ghini spawn tile. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Tombstone — Ghini spawn tile; Graveyard biome (NE corner of overworld)
